calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 2, 2002.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Peter Brian Bothel, Esq. appeared on behalf of the Plaintiff, William Michael Bray. James Jack was sworn and examined. Pursuant to testimony given and proper proof of publication and good cause appearing, the Court grants Quiet Title as prayed for in the petition.
